Asset Reference Review
Confirm what should ship instead of silently excluding anything.

      

        
Referenced Or Selected Assets

        
Optional Assets (Review Before Build)

      

      

        
        
      

    

  


  

    

      
Missing File References
These paths were referenced but not uploaded. Links stay unchanged.

      

      

    

  


  

    

      
Choose Entry HTML
Select the primary HTML file. Other pages can still ship in bundle mode.

      

      

        
        
      

    

  


  

    

      
System Manual

      

        
> 1. Asset Order Matters
Files are processed in workspace order. CSS later in the list can override earlier rules, JS dependencies should appear before consumers, and renames preserve parent folders.

        
> 2. Entry Point Selection
You choose the entry HTML when more than one page is present. Inline and bundle mode can generate a wrapper if no HTML exists. Bundle mode can preserve secondary HTML pages.

        
> 3. Protected Build Review
Reference scanning is conservative. Review optional assets before building so dynamic paths are not dropped by mistake. Output filenames are snapped at build time.

        
> 4. Utility Tools
Extract Output writes a manifest and can decode embedded data URLs. Folder Cleaner supports dry runs and skip-existing behavior. Image Converter supports direct file uploads and folder uploads with preserved relative paths.
